title: Exhaustive Review: bridge-zephyr 2026-06-27

notes:

close_reason: All 87 findings resolved: 3 P1, 20 P2, 45 P3, 2 P4. Key security fixes: replay epoch tracking, mutex UB prevention, state desync handling, EUI-64 validation. 11 files changed, +470/-117 lines.
